message:
fix(target-home): ignore stale TARGET_HOME and prefer on-disk resolution

Harden the target-user/target-home resolution chain used by every ACFS
subsystem so that a stale or deleted `TARGET_HOME` environment value can
no longer poison doctor, status, smoke-test, onboarding, or the direct-
exec fallback in `acfs` / `acfs-update`. Previously a prior install or a
dangling env value could be accepted purely because it was absolute and
not `/`; now every candidate path must also refer to an existing
directory on disk before it wins, and the multi-source resolvers (path
hint vs. system state vs. per-user state) have been reordered so the
strongest signal — the ACFS home's own parent directory — is consulted
first and the weaker state-file hints are only used when they agree with
(or are silent about) the path hint.

Library helpers — uniform `_<prefix>_existing_abs_home()` gate added and
wired into `_<prefix>_target_home` / `_<prefix>_runtime_home`:

  scripts/lib/agents.sh
  scripts/lib/cli_tools.sh
  scripts/lib/cloud_db.sh
  scripts/lib/languages.sh
  scripts/lib/stack.sh
  scripts/lib/update.sh        (also `update_existing_home`)
  scripts/lib/github_api.sh
  packages/onboard/onboard.sh  (also `onboard_acfs_home_target_home`
                                and explicit-home precedence fix)

Resolver priority reorder — `path_home` is consulted before the
`system_user`/`system_home` and `state_home` fallbacks, and the
system/state matches are gated on stricter AND-of-conditions instead of
the previous OR-of-conditions that could accept inconsistent state:

  scripts/lib/info.sh
  scripts/lib/smoke_test.sh
  scripts/lib/status.sh

Direct-exec path for `acfs` / `acfs-update` — new helpers
`existing_abs_nonroot_dir`, `resolve_target_home_from_state_hint`,
`resolve_direct_exec_target_home`, `resolve_direct_exec_acfs_home` so
the runtime `exec` re-invocation no longer hands an unchecked
`TARGET_HOME` (and its derived `$TARGET_HOME/.acfs`) to the child
process. Instead the acfs-home path hint, explicit state files, and
`TARGET_HOME` are tried in that order, and each candidate must resolve
to a real directory and agree with the chosen target home:

  scripts/acfs-global
  scripts/acfs-update

Support + export-config + dashboard — add `support_read_user_for_home`,
`support_infer_target_home_from_acfs_home`, parallel `read_user_for_home`
in export-config, and `dashboard_read_user_for_home`. Restructure
`support_initialize_context` so the path-derived home wins over stale
env, and the target user is discovered from the resolved home via passwd
before falling back to state/whoami:

  scripts/lib/support.sh
  scripts/lib/export-config.sh
  scripts/lib/dashboard.sh

Tests — new bats cases covering (a) `update_target_home` and every
helper `_<prefix>_target_home` correctly ignoring a stale `TARGET_HOME`
and falling back to passwd resolution, plus a new standalone shell test
harness for changelog/export status behaviour:

  tests/unit/lib/test_update.bats
  tests/unit/test_changelog_export_status.sh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+resolve_target_home_from_state_hint() {
+    local state_file="$1"
+    local candidate_home=""

+
+    state_file="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$state_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    [[ -n "$state_file" && -f "$state_file" ]] || return 1
+
+    candidate_home="$(state_file_path_user_home "$state_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    if [[ -n "$candidate_home" ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$candidate_home"

+    candidate_home="$(read_target_home_from_state_file "$state_file" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    candidate_home="$(existing_abs_nonroot_dir "$candidate_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"

+    [[ -n "$candidate_home" ]] || return 1
+    printf '%s\n' "$candidate_home"
+}
+
+resolve_direct_exec_target_home() {
+    local preferred_acfs_home="${1:-}"
+    local candidate_home=""
+    local state_candidate=""
+
+    preferred_acfs_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "$preferred_acfs_home" 2>/dev/null || true)"

+      candidate_home="$(resolve_target_home_from_state_hint "$preferred_acfs_home/state.json" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+      if [[ -n "$candidate_home" ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$candidate_home"
+        return 0
+      fi
+    fi
+
+    for state_candidate in "${ACFS_STATE_FILE:-}" "${ACFS_SYSTEM_STATE_FILE:-}"; do
+      candidate_home="$(resolve_target_home_from_state_hint "$state_candidate" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+      [[ -n "$candidate_home" ]] || continue
+      printf '%s\n' "$candidate_home"
+      return 0
+    done
+
+    candidate_home="$(resolve_target_home_from_state_hint "${ACFS_HOME:-}/state.json" 2>/dev/null || true)"

+      printf '%s\n' "$candidate_home"

+    printf '%s\n' "$candidate_home"

+
+resolve_direct_exec_acfs_home() {

+      candidate_home="$(resolve_target_home_from_state_hint "$preferred_acfs_home/state.json" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+      if [[ "$candidate_home" == "$target_home" ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$preferred_acfs_home"
+        return 0
+      fi
+    fi
+
+    candidate_acfs_home="$(existing_abs_nonroot_dir "$target_home/.acfs" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    if [[ -n "$candidate_acfs_home" ]]; then
+      printf '%s\n' "$candidate_acfs_home"
+      return 0
+    fi
+
+    candidate_acfs_home="$(sanitize_abs_nonroot_path "${ACFS_HOME:-}" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+    if [[ -n "$candidate_acfs_home" ]] && [[ "$candidate_acfs_home" == */.acfs ]] && [[ -d "$candidate_acfs_home" ]]; then
+      candidate_home="$(resolve_target_home_from_state_hint "$candidate_acfs_home/state.json" 2>/dev/null || true)"
+      if [[ "$candidate_home" == "$target_home" ]]; then
+        printf '%s\n' "$candidate_acfs_home"
+        return 0
+      fi
+    fi
+
+    return 1
+}
